allow: PowerShell(if \($env:GSC_ACCESS_TOKEN\) { "GSC_ACCESS_TOKEN is set \(length $\($env:GSC_ACCESS_TOKEN.Length\)\)" } else { "GSC_ACCESS_TOKEN not set" }; try { $u = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('GSC_ACCESS_TOKEN','User'\); if \($u\) { "User-level var set \(length $\($u.Length\)\)" } else { "No user-level var" } } catch {}; try { \(Get-Command gcloud -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "gcloud not installed" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\Cursor\\OTDCheck\\src\\app -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; "--- public ---"; Get-ChildItem C:\\Cursor\\OTDCheck\\public -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'robot|sitemap' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell(schtasks /Create /TN "COIPulseOutboundSender" /TR "cmd /c cd /d C:\\Cursor\\COIPulse\\outbound && python sender.py >> sender_task.log 2>&1" /SC DAILY /ST 09:30 /F; schtasks /Query /TN "COIPulseOutboundSender" /FO LIST | Select-Object -First 6)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5073/api/soul/verify/3" -Method GET | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(cd C:/Cursor/gotchi-closet-build; $env:PORT = "5073"; $env:SOUL_SEAL_ADDRESS = ""; $env:SOUL_ATTESTOR_KEY = ""; Start-Process -FilePath "pnpm" -ArgumentList "exec","tsx","server/index.ts" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\server-soul.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\server-soul-err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\server-soul.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\server-soul-err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Cursor\\gotchi-closet-build"; $env:PORT="5074"; $env:COMPANION_DB_PATH="./data/arena-curl-test.db"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "tsx","server/index.ts" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\tmp\\arena-server.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\tmp\\arena-server-err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Get-Content "C:\\tmp\\arena-server.log","C:\\tmp\\arena-server-err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20)
